title: Crypto Tax Exporter
description: Export a complete CSV of all ERC-20 transfers and transactions with USD cost basis for tax reporting — Koinly/CoinTracker compatible.
useCase: Build a one-click tax report tool that exports every buy, sell, and transfer with USD values at time of transaction for any wallet address.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain name — foundational chains preferred for historical price accuracy
keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to export transfers for
keyParams.year: Tax year filter — only include transfers from this calendar year
keyParams.pageNumber: 0-indexed page number for paginating through all transfers
